calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-04-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Soraida Oralia Ramirez was present in pro per, as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Katherine Stephanie Lopez.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Sylvia Sosa was placed under oath and served as Spanish speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Katherine Stephanie Lopez Ramirez.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-30-2010 Reset To Nov-04-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Katherine Stephanie Lopez present in pro per with Spanish Interpreter Maria Vega, were placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.

Lacks the Minor's Father consent and/ or proof of service or notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued toOct. 14, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or Order dispensing with notice.
No futher publication required.
